data.name: LOVE ON
data.detailed_description:
♥♥♥You Can Actually Touch Miyuki from the Original Novel?! ♥♥♥

Over 12,000,000 views!The original "How to Ruin a Romantic Comedy" from Novelpia has been brought to life!Summer beaches, festivals... even bathing together?!Experience intimate moments with Miyuki in the world of the game!

♥♥♥Story♥♥♥

One day, I got reincarnated as the delinquent 'Matsuda' in a romantic comedy game!The heroine, 'Hanazawa Miyuki', with a cute face and a voluptuous figure...After saving her from a dangerous situation, she says she wants to repay me?This is a great chance! I'll make sure she can't live without me!

♥♥♥Game Features♥♥♥

  • Fully voiced by professional voice actors
    - Miyuki CV(JP) : Monaca Morino
    - Miyuki CV(KO) : Jimin

  • Intimate dating experience
    - 6 episodes
    - 4 interactive touch mini-games

ⓒSongasonga / Novelpia Ltd.

data.short_description: Become the main character in a romantic comedy game. Set in a fresh summer, a hot romance between two people begins. From light touches to an exciting massage, she needs your skills now.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 韓文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit versions)
  • 處理器: CPU: Intel Core i5-8600 / AMD equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR or OpenXR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit versions)
  • 處理器: CPU: Intel Core i7-9700 / AMD equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3070 or equivalent or greater
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR or OpenXR
